seed_instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings.
org_constraint: Use the keyword "update" as a verb.
new_constraint: Use the keyword "update" solely as a noun.
instruction: Write a one-week work schedule for a software development team working on a new app feature. Allocate time for coding, testing, and team meetings. Use the keyword "update" as a verb. Use the keyword "update" solely as a noun.
response:
<|channel>thought
Here's a plan to fulfill the request:
1.  **Goal:** Create a one-week work schedule for a software development team on a new app feature.
2.  **Required Activities:** Coding, Testing, Team Meetings.
3.  **Constraint 1 (Verb):** Use "update" as a verb (e.g., *to update* the status).
4.  **Constraint 2 (Noun):** Use "update" solely as a noun (e.g., *an update* to the documentation).
5.  **Structure:** 5 working days (Monday to Friday).

*Self-Correction during drafting:* I must ensure that when I use "update" as a verb, it functions grammatically as an action taken by the team. When I use it as a noun, it must refer to a piece of information or revision.

*Execution.*<channel|>## One-Week Feature Development Schedule

This schedule outlines the planned activities for the team tackling the new app feature. The goal is iterative development, allowing the team to constantly **update** the design and the codebase.

---

### 🗓️ Monday: Planning & Setup

| Time | Activity | Focus/Goal | Team Members |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **9:00 - 10:00 AM** | **Sprint Kick-off Meeting** | Review feature requirements, define success metrics, and finalize initial task breakdowns. | All Team |
| 10:00 - 12:30 PM | Architectural Spike & Setup | Initial backend setup and establishing the core API endpoints. | Backend Devs |
| 12:30 - 1:30 PM | *Lunch* | | |
| 1:30 - 4:30 PM | Front-end Scaffolding | Setting up the basic UI structure and integrating placeholders. | Frontend Devs |
| 4:30 - 5:00 PM | Daily Standup & Progress **Update** | Each developer provides a brief **update** on what they plan to accomplish today. | All Team |

### 🗓️ Tuesday: Core Logic Implementation

| Time | Activity | Focus/Goal | Team Members |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 9:00 - 12:30 PM | Feature Logic Coding (V1) | Developing the primary business logic required for the new feature. | Backend Devs |
| 12:30 - 1:30 PM | *Lunch* | | |
| 1:30 - 4:30 PM | UI Component Development | Building complex, interactive components based on the design wireframes. | Frontend Devs |
| 4:30 - 5:00 PM | Review & Code **Update** | Developers review each other's submitted code for initial quality. | All Team |

### 🗓️ Wednesday: Integration & Internal Testing

| Time | Activity | Focus/Goal | Team Members |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 9:00 - 12:30 PM | Feature Integration | Connecting the backend APIs with the frontend UI to ensure seamless data flow. | All Devs |
| 12:30 - 1:30 PM | *Lunch* | | |
| 1:30 - 3:30 PM | Unit Testing | Writing and executing comprehensive unit tests for all new services and components. | All Devs |
| 3:30 - 4:30 PM | QA Handoff & Initial **Update** Review | The team provides an **update** to the QA lead on the current state of the feature for testing. | Devs & QA |
| 4:30 - 5:00 PM | Daily Standup | Address roadblocks and re-prioritize tasks. | All Team |

### 🗓️ Thursday: Debugging & Refinement

| Time | Activity | Focus/Goal | Team Members |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 9:00 - 11:00 AM | QA Feedback Review & Bug Fixing | Addressing critical bugs identified during the initial testing phase. | All Devs |
| 11:00 AM - 12:30 PM | Load Testing & Performance Check | Stress-testing the feature to identify bottlenecks and poor performance. | Backend/QA |
| 12:30 - 1:30 PM | *Lunch* | | |
| 1:30 - 4:00 PM | Feature Polish & Optimization | Refactoring code, optimizing database queries, and enhancing UX based on feedback. | All Devs |
| 4:00 - 5:00 PM | Documentation **Update** | Creating and refining internal documentation and API guides. | Devs |

### 🗓️ Friday: Final Review & Deployment Prep

| Time | Activity | Focus/Goal | Team Members |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 9:00 - 11:00 AM | End-to-End Acceptance Testing | Running full-cycle tests to ensure the feature meets all original acceptance criteria. | All Team |
| 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM | **Project Update** Meeting | Final presentation and demonstration of the completed feature. Discuss the next steps. | All Team & Stakeholders |
| 12:00 - 1:00 PM | *Lunch* | | |
| 1:00 - 3:00 PM | Code Freeze & Deployment Prep | Merging final code branches and preparing the environment for release. | Devs |
| 3:00 - 5:00 PM | Retrospective & **Update** Logging | The team discusses what went well, what needs improvement, and records the final **update** logs. | All Team |<turn|>
